title: Sage and the Magic Acorn
synopsis: Sage the young squirrel finds a glowing magic acorn that grants wishes, but learns that the best magic comes from sharing and friendship when he helps his forest friends.

pages.text: Sage was a little squirrel who loved adventures. He had soft brown fur and a fluffy tail. One sunny morning, he climbed down from his oak tree home. "Today I will find something special," Sage said to himself. He scampered through the forest, looking under leaves and behind rocks.

illustration.description: A small brown squirrel with big bright eyes and a fluffy tail climbing down a tall oak tree. Morning sunlight filters through green leaves, creating golden spots on the forest floor. The squirrel has an excited, curious expression. Rich greens and warm browns dominate the scene.
illustration.alt: Sage the squirrel climbing down his oak tree home in the morning sunlight

pages.text: Near a babbling brook, something caught his eye. Behind a big mushroom, there was a strange glow. Sage crept closer. There, half-buried in the soft dirt, was the most beautiful acorn he had ever seen. It glowed with golden light! "Wow!" Sage whispered. "This must be magic!"

illustration.description: A magical golden acorn glowing softly behind a large red-spotted mushroom near a sparkling brook. Sage the squirrel peeks around the mushroom with wide, amazed eyes. The scene has mystical golden light emanating from the acorn, with purple and blue shadows creating a magical atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Sage discovering the glowing magic acorn behind a mushroom

pages.text: Sage picked up the warm, glowing acorn. As soon as he touched it, a tiny voice spoke from inside! "Hello, little squirrel. I am a magic acorn. I can grant three wishes to whoever finds me." Sage's eyes grew wide. "Three wishes? Really?" "Yes," said the acorn. "But choose wisely."

illustration.description: Sage holding the glowing golden acorn in his small paws, with sparkles and swirls of magical light surrounding them both. His expression shows wonder and excitement. The acorn has a gentle, wise face visible in its glow. Warm golden and amber colors fill the scene.
illustration.alt: Sage holding the magical talking acorn with sparkles around them

pages.text: Sage thought about his first wish. His tummy rumbled loudly. "I wish for the biggest, most delicious nut in the whole forest!" he said. POOF! A giant walnut appeared. It was as big as Sage himself! "Oh my!" Sage laughed. "This is huge!" He tried to crack it open, but it was too big.

illustration.description: Sage sitting next to an enormous walnut that's bigger than he is, with magical sparkles and smoke from the wish still floating around. His expression is surprised and delighted but also a bit confused. The walnut is detailed with realistic shell patterns. Warm browns and golden magical effects.
illustration.alt: Sage next to a giant walnut that appeared from his wish

pages.text: "Help! Help!" came a voice from nearby. Sage looked up from his giant nut. It was Luna, a little rabbit with floppy ears. She was stuck under a fallen branch! "Don't worry, Luna!" Sage called. He ran over and helped push the branch away. Luna hopped free. "Thank you, Sage!" she said.

illustration.description: A small white rabbit with long floppy ears and big expressive eyes trapped under a brown tree branch. Sage the squirrel is running toward her with a determined, helpful expression. The forest setting has dappled sunlight and green foliage. Luna looks worried but hopeful.
illustration.alt: Luna the rabbit stuck under a branch with Sage running to help

pages.text: "I hurt my paw," Luna said sadly. "Now I can't hop home to get food for my family." Sage looked at his giant walnut, then at Luna's sad face. He had an idea. "Wait here!" he said. Sage ran back and got the magic acorn. Maybe his second wish could help Luna too.

illustration.description: Luna the rabbit sitting on a moss-covered log, holding up one paw with a sad expression. Sage looks thoughtful and caring as he considers how to help. The forest around them is lush with ferns and wildflowers. Soft, gentle colors convey the tender moment.
illustration.alt: Luna showing her hurt paw to a thoughtful Sage

pages.text: "Magic acorn," Sage said, "I wish for Luna's paw to feel better!" The acorn glowed brighter. Gentle sparkles surrounded Luna's paw. "Oh!" Luna said. "It doesn't hurt anymore!" She hopped up and down happily. "Thank you, Sage! You used your wish to help me!"

illustration.description: Magical golden sparkles swirling around Luna's paw as she sits on the grass. Her expression changes from pain to joy and amazement. Sage holds the glowing acorn with a kind, caring smile. The magical healing sparkles create a warm, hopeful atmosphere with soft yellows and greens.
illustration.alt: Magical sparkles healing Luna's paw while Sage watches with the glowing acorn

pages.text: Just then, Kai the young fox came running through the trees. He had orange fur and a white-tipped tail. "Have you seen any food?" Kai asked. "My little sister is very hungry, but I can't find anything!" Sage looked at Luna, then at the magic acorn. He had one wish left.

illustration.description: A young fox with bright orange fur, white chest, and white-tipped tail running toward Sage and Luna. Kai has a worried expression and big concerned eyes. The forest background shows him emerging from green bushes and trees. Rich oranges and greens create a vivid forest scene.
illustration.alt: Kai the fox running through the forest looking worried

pages.text: Sage thought hard about his last wish. He could wish for anything! More nuts for himself, or maybe a bigger tree house. But then he looked at his new friends. "I have an idea," Sage said with a big smile. "Magic acorn, I wish for enough food for everyone in the forest!"

illustration.description: Sage holding the magic acorn high above his head with a determined, generous expression. Luna and Kai stand nearby, looking hopeful and amazed by Sage's kindness. Golden magical energy begins to swirl around all three friends. The forest setting glows with warm, magical light.
illustration.alt: Sage making his final wish while Luna and Kai watch hopefully

pages.text: POOF! The biggest magic yet happened! All around them, delicious food appeared. Berries, nuts, carrots, and seeds covered the ground. "Wow!" said Luna. "Amazing!" said Kai. Animals came from everywhere - Zara the deer, Marcus the hedgehog, and Aria the owl. Everyone had enough to eat!

illustration.description: A magical feast spread across the forest floor with colorful berries, nuts, carrots, and seeds everywhere. Various forest animals including a graceful deer, a spiky hedgehog, and a wise owl gathering around the food. Everyone has joyful, grateful expressions. Rich purples, reds, oranges, and browns create a bountiful scene.
illustration.alt: Magical food appearing everywhere with diverse forest animals gathering to share

pages.text: "You shared your wishes with us," Luna said. "That was very kind." The magic acorn glowed one last time. "Your heart is full of kindness, Sage," it said. "That is the best magic of all." Then the acorn stopped glowing and became a regular acorn. But Sage didn't mind. He had made wonderful friends.

illustration.description: All the forest friends gathered in a circle around Sage, who holds the now-normal brown acorn. Everyone is smiling and laughing together, sharing the magical feast. The scene shows friendship and community with warm, happy colors. Luna, Kai, and other diverse animal friends show gratitude and joy.
illustration.alt: All the forest friends celebrating together around Sage with the normal acorn

pages.text: From that day on, Sage, Luna, and Kai were the best of friends. They played together every day. They shared their food and helped each other. Sage learned that making friends was better than making wishes. And whenever they saw that old oak tree, they remembered their magical adventure together.

illustration.description: Sage, Luna, and Kai playing together under the big oak tree where Sage's adventure began. They're laughing and chasing each other in a game of tag. The oak tree stands majestically in the background with golden sunlight streaming through its leaves. The scene radiates friendship and joy.
illustration.alt: The three friends playing happily together under Sage's oak tree

pages.text: "I'm glad I found that magic acorn," Sage said one day. "But I'm even more glad I found you two!" Luna and Kai smiled. "We're glad too!" they said together. And they all lived happily ever after in their magical forest, where friendship was the greatest magic of all.

illustration.description: The three friends sitting together on a hill overlooking their beautiful forest home at sunset. They're hugging and looking content, with the entire magical forest spread below them. Warm sunset colors of orange, pink, and gold paint the sky, while the forest glows with the last light of day.
illustration.alt: Sage, Luna, and Kai watching the sunset together over their forest home

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What did Sage find behind the mushroom?
questions.explanation: Sage found a glowing magic acorn behind the big mushroom near the brook.

questions.question: How many wishes did the magic acorn grant?
questions.explanation: The magic acorn could grant three wishes to whoever found it.

questions.question: What was Sage's first wish?
questions.explanation: Sage wished for the biggest, most delicious nut in the forest, and got a giant walnut.

questions.question: Who needed help with a hurt paw?
questions.explanation: Luna the rabbit hurt her paw when she got stuck under a fallen branch.

questions.question: What was Sage's final wish?
choices: Enough food for everyone in the forest
To keep the magic acorn forever
questions.explanation: Sage used his last wish to create enough food for all the animals in the forest.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.instructions: Fill in the missing words from the story!
pages.text: Sage was a little _____ who loved adventures. He found a magic _____ that could grant _____ wishes. Sage used his wishes to help his _____.

pages.title: Character Matching
pages.instructions: Match each character with what happened to them!
pages.text: _____ found the magic acorn. _____ got stuck under a branch. _____ was looking for food for his sister.
